name: toughtongue
description: Skills and MCP server for Tough Tongue AI — the platform for tough conversations. Some, the AI takes: voice agents that call, demo, screen, and book. Others, you nail: realistic roleplay for negotiations, interviews, and coaching. Build agents, refine them from real transcripts, and analyze sessions.

interface.longDescription: Gives your agent first-class access to Tough Tongue AI — the platform for handling tough conversations. Some, the AI takes: voice agents that answer and place phone calls, join Zoom or Google Meet, run product demos, screen candidates, and book meetings. Others, you nail: hyper-realistic roleplay that gets you ready for negotiations, interviews, and coaching conversations. Bundles the hosted MCP server (scenarios, sessions, analytics, SIP calls, meeting bots) with three skills: scenario-creator builds production-ready agent scenarios from a brief or call transcript, scenario-refiner fixes live agents from real session evidence, and session-analyst turns session data into performance reports.
defaultPrompt: Get me started with ToughTongue AI.
Create a ToughTongue scenario to practice handling pricing objections.
Pull the last 50 sessions for my discovery-call scenario and list the top 5 improvement areas.
The onboarding agent ends calls too early — pull low-scoring sessions and fix the scenario.
